summary: Iteration 45 - Email Verification, Marketing Campaigns, and Lead Follow-Up Testing. All 23 backend tests passed (2 skipped). All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly. Email verification system creates unverified users, stores tokens, and notifies admin. Campaign CRUD (create, list, preview, send, delete) working. Lead tracking shows 33 stale drafts with reminder functionality.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions when page first loads - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: Registration creates user with email_verified=false
Backend: Registration creates email_verifications token in DB
Backend: Registration creates new_signup notification for admin
Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-email?token=invalid returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/resend-verification requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/auth/resend-verification works for authenticated user
Backend: POST /api/admin/campaigns creates campaign with correct fields
Backend: GET /api/admin/campaigns returns list of campaigns
Backend: POST /api/admin/campaigns/{id}/preview returns HTML preview
Backend: Preview returns 404 for nonexistent campaign
Backend: POST /api/admin/campaigns/{id}/send sends campaign to users
Backend: Campaign status changes to 'sent' after sending
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/campaigns/{id} deletes campaign
Backend: Delete returns 404 for nonexistent campaign
Backend: Campaign endpoints require admin authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/leads returns leads with total and stale_count
Backend: Leads have all required fields (id, type, user_id, user_name, user_email, title, status, stale)
Backend: Lead types are valid (draft_release or draft_beat)
Backend: POST /api/admin/leads/send-reminder requires lead_id and lead_type
Backend: Send reminder returns 404 for nonexistent lead
Backend: POST /api/admin/leads/send-all-reminders sends reminders to stale leads
Backend: Leads endpoints require admin authentication
Backend: Test campaigns cleaned up successfully
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows Campaigns nav item
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows Lead Follow-Up nav item
Frontend: /admin/campaigns page loads with campaigns-page testid
Frontend: New Campaign button visible with data-testid='new-campaign-btn'
Frontend: Campaigns list visible with existing 'Welcome 2026' campaign
Frontend: Campaign form opens with all fields (name, subject, audience, gradient, body)
Frontend: /admin/leads page loads with leads-page testid
Frontend: Lead stats show Total Drafts (33), Stale (33), Reminded (33)
Frontend: Lead filters visible (All, Stale Only, Releases, Beats)
Frontend: Send All Reminders button visible with data-testid='send-all-reminders-btn'
Frontend: Leads list shows draft releases with STALE and REMINDED badges
Frontend: /verify-email page loads with verify-email-page testid
Frontend: Verify Email shows error state for missing token
Frontend: Go to Dashboard button visible on error state
critical_code_review_comments: Email verification system properly creates email_verified=false on registration
Verification tokens stored in email_verifications collection with 24h expiry
Admin receives new_signup notification for every new user registration
Campaign CRUD endpoints properly validate admin role
Campaign send creates in-app notifications for all targeted users
Lead tracking correctly identifies draft/pending/inactive releases and beats
Stale threshold is 24 hours - leads older than 24h marked as stale
Reminder system marks leads as reminder_sent to prevent duplicate reminders
All data-testid attributes present for testing (campaigns-page, new-campaign-btn, campaign-form, leads-page, lead-stats, lead-filters, send-all-reminders-btn, verify-email-page)
Email delivery may fail due to Resend test domain restriction (onboarding@resend.dev only works for account owner's email), but all notification logic fires correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (TEST_verify_* prefix). Existing campaign 'Welcome 2026' was present from previous testing. 33 stale draft releases found in leads system.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 tested the new Email Verification, Marketing Campaigns, and Lead Follow-Up features. The registration flow now creates email_verified=false on user doc, stores verification token in email_verifications collection, and creates new_signup notification for admin. The /admin/campaigns page allows creating, previewing, sending, and deleting email campaigns with audience targeting (all, artist, label_producer). The /admin/leads page shows 33 stale draft releases with reminder functionality - all leads have been reminded. The /verify-email page handles email verification tokens. Email delivery uses Resend API but may fail for non-owner emails due to test domain restriction - this is expected behavior until a custom domain is configured.

mocked_apis.note: Email delivery may silently fail due to Resend test domain restriction (onboarding@resend.dev only works for account owner's email), but all API logic is correct and notifications are created in-app.

email_verification.verification_token_created: Stored in email_verifications collection with 24h expiry

marketing_campaigns.create: POST /api/admin/campaigns - Creates campaign with name, subject, body_html, audience
marketing_campaigns.send: POST /api/admin/campaigns/{id}/send - Sends to matching users, creates notifications

lead_follow_up.list: GET /api/admin/leads - Returns leads with total, stale_count
lead_follow_up.send_all_reminders: POST /api/admin/leads/send-all-reminders - Sends to all stale leads
